name: torso_turn_to_target
description: Turn torso yaw toward a target position while preserving current torso height joints.

parameters.object_body: Optional target body used instead of explicit target position.
parameters.object_geom: Optional target geom used instead of explicit target position.
parameters.target_qpos: Optional 4-element posture whose first 3 joints are preserved while yaw is recomputed.
